This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] vertical-lr: Right/Left keys navigate as primary axis
  assert_equals: ArrowRight should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <option class="one">one</option>
[FAIL] vertical-rl: Left/Right keys navigate as primary axis (block-flipped)
  assert_equals: ArrowLeft should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <option class="one">one</option>
[FAIL] sideways-lr: Right/Left keys navigate as primary axis
  assert_equals: ArrowRight should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <option class="one">one</option>
[FAIL] sideways-rl: Left/Right keys navigate as primary axis (block-flipped)
  assert_equals: ArrowLeft should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <option class="one">one</option>
Harness: the test ran to completion.
